ARTICLE 5 – EQUALITY AND NON-DISCRIMINATION
States Parties recognize that all persons are equal 
before and under the law and are entitled without any 
discrimination to the equal protection and equal benefit 
of the law. 
States Parties shall prohibit all discrimination on the basis 
of disability and guarantee to persons with disabilities 
equal and effective legal protection against discrimination 
on all grounds. 
In order to promote equality and eliminate discrimination, 
States Parties shall take all appropriate steps to ensure 
that reasonable accommodation is provided.

Supreme Court Reports
ARTICLE 9 – ACCESSIBILITY
To enable persons with disabilities to live independently 
and participate fully in all aspects of life, States Parties 
shall take appropriate measures to ensure to persons 
with disabilities access, on an equal basis with others, 
to the physical environment, to transportation, to
